name: French Canadian Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, all in one piece
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the peas; soak them in cold water overnight.
2. Drain the peas and place them in a large pot with 8 cups of water.
3. Add parsley, salt pork (cut into one piece), onion, celery, carrots, additional parsley, bay leaf, savory, and 1 teaspoon of salt to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the peas are very tender, about 2 hours. Add more water if needed during cooking.
5. Remove the salt pork from the soup and chop it. Return the chopped pork to the soup (or discard if desired).
6. Discard the bay leaf.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, as pea soup is excellent when reheated.
This recipe yields 8 servings.
